name: LED Light Module – 1.2W/12V – IP68 – 100pcs Set
description: ZION LED USA Modules are excellent for illuminating signs or outlining windows. Anyone can install these with ease because they wire directly into a standard 12V outlet with no driver required. These lights are safe for outdoor use and protected from rain, snow, and weak jets of water, such as sprinklers. LED Modules are perfect for gas stations, grocery stores, and shopping centers.
short_desc: Product Attributes: Wattage: 1.2W/module Brightness: 150–165 lm/module Colors: Cool White, Warm White, Red, Green, Blue, RGB Voltage: 12V AC Power Factor: ≥ 0.9 Efficacy: 100 lm/W CRI: 90+ Beam Angle: 120–160° Dimmable: Yes Temp Range: -20°C to 60°C Material: Aluminum & PC Housing Color: White / Clear Lens: Clear Waterproof: IP68 Certification: UL Lifespan: 50,000 hours Warranty: 3 Years Length: 48 ft
